trans.div: Hunting on behalf of the sky

transliterations.transliteration: suè 次 kah 戌 liân Kiat tuànn
seoi3 ci3 gaap3 seot1 nin4 gat1 daan3
suì cì jiǎ xū nián jí dàn

trans.div: The auspicious day of Jiaxu year

ocr.orig: 重光福德宮修建沿革碑記/本宮坐丙山王向兼巳亥分金丁巳、丁亥、屬土/緣由於萬曆末閩民來澎始居在山仔後,因陰盛陽衰妖魔鬼怪作亂,民心惶/惶不能安居樂業,所至遷移窟潭,「社名曰」,稱為,「後窟潭」,現在里名/稱重光里是也。定住在處民康安寧,為保護民安在玉兔此址興建一座小廟名日/「土地公宮」「福德宮」,奉祀福德正神鎮守,四境安寧庇佑,吾鄉民康物阜/人丁興旺,六畜旺盛,五穀豐登,旋於乾隆以前修建幾次,乃以在乾隆至光緒/之間重建數次,迨至民國三十八年己丑柽月重修,歷經二十六餘載受風雨之摧/殘欅楝腐蝕廟貌日非,於民國六十四乙卯花月改建,以北體式鐵筋混凝土造/廟貌壯麗雄威,然觀廟宇位在海邊地季風來時海水煙霧鐵筋不堪受殘廟蓋/梁棟牆壁剝落,已呈陳舊,何以伸禮佛之心,是以神雖靈感,亦須壯觀廟貌,/兩者並重,因此福德神靈顯赫,託夢虔誠善,廟宇已非昔日之美,神民不要/以此善士信眾有感,於福德神靈,因此倡議重建,由弟子葉根狀設計繪圖進行/發包興建,擇於民國九十八年歲次己丑八月十一日西時出火拆除動土,同月十/五日未時起基安吟興工,以鐵筋混凝土造興建,並擴建增設廟庭,及葫爐形金/爐,於是廟貌更為壯麗觀瞻,雄威莊嚴,在短期三個月之間,今本宮工程全部/已告嬌,人傑地靈,田境安寧,民康物阜,赫濯靈光,神光普照,皆賴各方大/德虔誠信衆,傾囊慨捐,咸報神恩,並擇於民國九十九年歲次己丑季冬之月初/二日已時安門,安樑卦,合脊同時歸火進宮,同月初五日卯時落成大典,齋醮/祈求。/風調雨順/不合國/田時吉慶/特在宮内/以誌萬年不朽·緣由于永遠 是為記/7/主委:葉竹林/澎湖馬公重光里威靈殿管理委員會/副主委陳棟樑 呂再 再池/委員:葉在民 陳壽全 胡正烈 葉光輝 葉德 葉文昌 陳柏宏/陳得仕 葉根牀 林桉發 陳喬鈗 胡金城 薛武志 薛武川/葉德重 呂世改 呂明忠 葉德亮 呂志憲 陳天成 呂瑞委/卿老 葉德榮 薛富盛 呂锡金/頭家 呂冠樟 陳媵平 呂翔弘/中華民國九十九年歲次己丑季冬之月左記
ocr.mod: 重光福德宮修建沿革碑記/本宮坐丙山王向兼巳亥分金丁巳、丁亥、屬土/緣由於萬曆末閩民來澎始居在山仔後,因陰盛陽衰妖魔鬼怪作亂,民心惶/惶不能安居樂業,所至遷移窟潭,「社名曰」,稱為,「後窟潭」,現在里名/稱重光里是也。定住在處民康安寧,為保護民安在玉兔此址興建一座小廟名日/「土地公宮」「福德宮」,奉祀福德正神鎮守,四境安寧庇佑,吾鄉民康物阜/人丁興旺,六畜旺盛,五穀豐登,旋於乾隆以前修建幾次,乃以在乾隆至光緒/之間重建數次,迨至民國三十八年己丑柽月重修,歷經二十六餘載受風雨之摧/殘欅楝腐蝕廟貌日非,於民國六十四乙卯花月改建,以北體式鐵筋混凝土造/廟貌壯麗雄威,然觀廟宇位在海邊地季風來時海水煙霧鐵筋不堪受殘廟蓋/梁棟牆壁剝落,已呈陳舊,何以伸禮佛之心,是以神雖靈感,亦須壯觀廟貌,/兩者並重,因此福德神靈顯赫,託夢虔誠善,廟宇已非昔日之美,神民不要/以此善士信眾有感,於福德神靈,因此倡議重建,由弟子葉根狀設計繪圖進行/發包興建,擇於民國九十八年歲次己丑八月十一日西時出火拆除動土,同月十/五日未時起基安吟興工,以鐵筋混凝土造興建,並擴建增設廟庭,及葫爐形金/爐,於是廟貌更為壯麗觀瞻,雄威莊嚴,在短期三個月之間,今本宮工程全部/已告嬌,人傑地靈,田境安寧,民康物阜,赫濯靈光,神光普照,皆賴各方大/德虔誠信衆,傾囊慨捐,咸報神恩,並擇於民國九十九年歲次己丑季冬之月初/二日已時安門,安樑卦,合脊同時歸火進宮,同月初五日卯時落成大典,齋醮/祈求。/風調雨順/不合國/田時吉慶/特在宮内/以誌萬年不朽·緣由于永遠 是為記/7/主委:葉竹林/澎湖馬公重光里威靈殿管理委員會/副主委陳棟樑 呂再 再池/委員:葉在民 陳壽全 胡正烈 葉光輝 葉德 葉文昌 陳柏宏/陳得仕 葉根牀 林桉發 陳喬鈗 胡金城 薛武志 薛武川/葉德重 呂世改 呂明忠 葉德亮 呂志憲 陳天成 呂瑞委/卿老 葉德榮 薛富盛 呂锡金/頭家 呂冠樟 陳媵平 呂翔弘/中華民國九十九年歲次己丑季冬之月左記
ocr.trans: An inscription on the construction history of Chongguang Fude Palace/The palace sat on the Bingshan Mountain and divided the gold to Jiansihai Dingsi, Dinghai, and Tu/The reason is that at the end of Wanli, the Fujian people came to Peng and first settled in Shanzihou. Due to the rise of Yin and Yang, the demons and ghosts caused chaos, and the people were panicked/unable to live and work in peace and contentment, so they moved to Caotan. In order to protect the well-being and tranquility of the people living in the place, a small temple was built at the site of Jade Rabbit, named "Tu Tu Gong Palace" and "Fu Fu Palace", to enshrine and guard the God of Fude. Peace and protection will be provided in all areas, and the people of our village will be prosperous and prosperous. Ding Xingwang, Liu> Livestock were prosperous, and grains were abundant. It was built several times before Qianlong, and was rebuilt several times between Qianlong and Guangxu. It was rebuilt in Ji Chou in the 38th year of the Republic of China, and it lasted more than 26 years. Devastated by wind and rain, the temple's appearance deteriorated due to neem corrosion. It was rebuilt in the 64th year of the Republic of China and was made of northern-style ferro-reinforced concrete. The temple is majestic and majestic. However, the temple is located on the seaside where seawater smoke smogs when the monsoon comes. The iron bars cannot bear the damage to the temple cover/The beams and walls are peeling off and they are old. How can we extend our heart to worship the Buddha? Even though the gods inspire us, we must also have a spectacular temple appearance./Both are equally important. Therefore, the gods of merit are prominent, and the temples are pious and kind. It is no longer as beautiful as it once was, and the gods and people do not want it. The believers feel this, and for the sake of merit and deity, they advocate reconstruction. Disciple Ye Genzhi designs and draws/contracts the construction. Demolition and demolition were started on the 11th day of the eighth lunar month of the 98th year of the Republic of China. On the 10th and 5th of the same month, the construction started at Ji'an Yin. It was built with iron-reinforced concrete, and the temple courtyard was expanded and a gourd-shaped furnace was added. The appearance of the temple became more magnificent. Majestic and majestic, within a short period of three months, all the projects of this palace have been completed. The people are outstanding, the land is peaceful, the people are happy and the things are prosperous, and the aura of Hezhao and the light of God are shining all over. All thanks to the great virtues and devout believers from all sides. Donations from the bag were made to repay God's grace, and the gate was installed on the second day of the first month of the Ji Chou season in the 99th year of the Republic of China, the Liang Gua was installed, and the backbone was returned to the palace. /The weather is smooth/Unfortunate/Tian Shi Jiqing/Specially in the palace/With ambitions of eternal immortality·The reason is eternal/7/Chairman: Ye Zhulin/Penghu Magong Chongguangli Wei Ling Hall Management Committee/Deputy Chairman Chen Dongliang > Lu Zai Zaichi/Committee: Ye Zaimin, Chen Shouguan, Hu Zhenglie, Ye Guanghui, Ye De, Ye Wenchang, Chen Baihong/Chen Deshi, Ye Gengbed, Lin Yufa Chen Qiaojie, Hu Jincheng, Xue Wuzhi, Xue Wuchuan/Ye Dezhong, Lu Shigai, Lu Mingzhong, Ye Deliang, Lu Zhixian, Chen Tiancheng, Lu Ruiwei/Qing Lao, Ye Derong, Xue Fusheng, Lu Xijin/Toujia, Lu Guanzhang, Chen Yaping, Lu Xianghong/Zuo Ji of Ji Chou, the winter month of the 99th year of the Republic of China.

text.transcription: 重地光照玉免澎山而不老

normalization.div: 重地光照玉免澎山而不老

transliterations.transliteration: tiông tē Kong tsiàu gio̍k bián phênn suann 而 put lāu
cung4/cung5/zung6 dei6/deng6 gwong1 ziu3 juk6 man6/min5 paang1/paang4 saan1 ji4 bat1/fau2 lou5
zhòng de guāng zhào yù miǎn pēng shān ér bù lǎo

trans.div: Illumination from the heavy ground keeps me from the Pengshan Mountains and I don’t grow old.
